body_txt: Planet looters are a race of aliens that have run out of something, and must steal it from others — frequently, from us here on Earth . This is peculiar in that their demonstrated level of technology makes one wonder why they'd target Earth when it would be far easier to find an uninhabited planet and strip-mine that. To Handwave that problem, they often need some particular resource which is supposedly rare: Notably, all of these approaches, with the sole exception of the last option, are certified garbage. Hydrogen and oxygen, the compounds that make up water, are the first and third most common elements in the universe; Hydrogen is fairly scarce on planets like Earth that are close to their parent star. Most raw resources on Earth are not unique to it and can be sourced from any other rocky planet in the universe. Any manual labor humans perform can probably be done better and at a cheaper cost with robots — said robots need not be all that intelligent, closing off one pathway to a convincing Robot War , unless if they are, for some reason, coordinated by some central superintelligences — though, granted, the planet looters may be opposed to A.I. and automation for one reason or another. They could probably ethically culture human meat, too. It's fairly popular to make humans fill this role (to the horror of the Space Elves ), as a Green Aesop about the exploitation of natural resources. Usually results in an Alien Invasion . Compare Space Pirates , Horde of Alien Locusts , Planet Eater , Mars Needs Water , and Mars Needs Women .
